allow: Bash(zip -r Nutralmena.zip Nutralmena/ -x 'Nutralmena/node_modules/*' 'Nutralmena/.next/*' 'Nutralmena/.git/*' Nutralmena/.gitignore Nutralmena/package-lock.json 'Nutralmena/.env*' Nutralmena/Contexto.txt Nutralmena/PROYECTO.md Nutralmena/README.md Nutralmena/CLAUDE.md Nutralmena/AGENTS.md 'Nutralmena/.agents/*' 'Nutralmena/.claude/*' 'Nutralmena/*.local.json')

PowerShell(Add-Type -AssemblyName System.IO.Compression.FileSystem; $zip = [System.IO.Compression.ZipFile]::OpenRead\("C:\\Websites\\Nutralmena.zip"\); $entries = $zip.Entries | Sort-Object FullName; Write-Output "Total entries: $\($entries.Count\)"; $entries | ForEach-Object { $_.FullName }; $zip.Dispose\(\))
